title: Min-Heap Priority Queue
description: Implements a generic min-heap priority queue with efficient insert and extract-min operations.
explanation: This min-heap implementation uses an array-based binary heap structure to efficiently manage priorities. Insertion and extraction both operate in O(log n) time due to the heapify-up and heapify-down operations. It's useful for scheduling tasks, Dijkstra's algorithm, or any scenario where you need to process items by priority.
